notes: Three-leg WTI/AUD/NZD commodity-FX relative-value basket from the approved EIA-RBA-RBNZ-WTI-FX-2026 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads all three D1 close series to compute ln(XTIUSD) - beta_aud * ln(AUDUSD) - beta_nzd * ln(NZDUSD). Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
